channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Pharmacogenetic testing may improve SSRI response in depression treatment
item.description: Genotype-guided SSRI prescribing could enhance treatment response in both children and adults with depression, according to a recent study.

item.title: Small study finds CO2 laser excision effective for severe HS
item.description: A small retrospective review found CO2 laser excision of hidradenitis suppurativa lesions effective and well-tolerated in severe cases.

item.title: WHO confirms eight Andes hantavirus cases in cruise outbreak
item.description: Eight people aboard the MV Hondius tested positive for Andes hantavirus, the only strain known to transmit between humans.

item.title: Heart attack linked to faster cognitive decline, study finds
item.description: A study in Stroke found that people who had a heart attack had a significantly higher risk of developing cognitive impairment.
